Crypto Analyst Predicts Bitcoin and Altcoin Implosion Amid Incoming Recession and Stock Market Collapse
articles.description: A closely followed crypto analyst is predicting an implosion for Bitcoin (BTC) and altcoins as he believes that a recession and a stock market collapse are on the horizon. In a new strategy session, Nicholas Merten, the host of DataDash, tells his 511,000 YouTube subscribers that Bitcoin bulls are betting on a sustained rally following […] The post Crypto Analyst Predicts Bitcoin and Altcoin Implosion Amid Incoming Recession and Stock Market Collapse appeared first on The Daily Hodl.
